title: Cale Berkona
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Cale}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:CaleBerkona-ShadowsAndLight.jpg]] |name=Cale Berkona |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{Tales|23|Shadows and Light}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]{{Fact}} |pronouns=He/him{{Fact}} |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=Light |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|There is no death… there is only the Force.|Cale Berkona, in the grasp of a terentatek|}} '''Cale Berkona''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who took part in the [[Great Hunt (Jedi)|Great Hunt]], a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] campaign to eradicate [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]-created [[Sithspawn/Legends|beasts]] from the [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] following the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. During the Hunt, Berkona joined a group of Jedi that traveled the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] battling [[Terentatek/Legends|terentateks]], dangerous monstrosities that feasted on [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Blood/Legends|blood]]. In [[3993 BBY]], Berkona took part in a [[Cleansing of Tatooine|hunt]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] that saw him barely escape a terentatek's clutches. Although badly wounded and his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] destroyed, Berkona survived and returned to the [[Jedi Enclave]] on the planet [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. ==Biography== A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Cale Berkona was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] following the end of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. In the aftermath of the [[Sith Empire (Exar Kun)/Legends|Sith Empire's]] defeat in [[3996 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] declared the beginning of the [[Great Hunt (Jedi)|Great Hunt]], a campaign meant to eradicate [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]-created [[Sithspawn/Legends|creatures]] from [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' During the Hunt, Berkona took up with a group of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] that included Humans [[Duron Qel-Droma]] and [[Shaela Nuur]], and [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Guun Han Saresh]]. The Jedi started going after [[Terentatek/Legends|terentateks]]—vicious, Sith-created beasts that fed on [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Blood/Legends|blood]]. In [[3993 BBY]],"[[Shadows and Light]]" places the [[Cleansing of Tatooine|mission to Tatooine]] three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[3996 BBY]]. Therefore, the [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] mission takes place in [[3993 BBY]]. Berkona joined the team on a [[Cleansing of Tatooine|mission]] to cleanse the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] of terentateks. The Jedi found and [[Death/Legends|eliminated]] a number of the beasts, tracking the last remaining terentatek to a [[Cave/Legends|cave]]. Berkona and his compatriots followed the beast in, and the terentatek was briefly able to seize the upper hand, killing [[Unidentified Jedi (Great Hunt)|one of the hunters]]. Berkona quickly found himself in the terentatek's grasp, his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] destroyed—his death seemingly near, Berkona recited part of the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]] as he stared into the monster's [[Mouth/Legends|maw]]. However, Qel-Droma was able to [[Mind trick/Legends|confuse]] the beast with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], allowing Berkona to slip away while Saresh and Nuur slayed the terentatek. The dead terentateks were placed on a [[Fire/Legends|burning pyre]], and an injured Berkona limped back to the group's [[Starship/Legends|ship]] with assistance from Saresh. A metal cast had to be placed on Berkona's left [[Limb/Legends|arm]] by the [[Time/Legends|time]] the four made their way back to the [[Jedi Enclave]] on the planet [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. There, Berkona learned from Saresh that Qel-Droma, Nuur, and the Twi'lek had been personally selected by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] to cleanse the Sith [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] of terentateks, a mission that was considered to be highly dangerous. Berkona was initially shocked that the Council would send the three on such a quest, and Saresh expressed to him concerns that Qel-Droma and Nuur's passion for each other might create problems on Korriban. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|They need this final hunt done quickly and quietly… and we're the best.''"
"''True. But… aren't you a bit concerned?|Guun Han Saresh and Cale Berkona, discussing the mission to Korriban|}} During the Great Hunt, Berkona was willing to place himself in great danger to see the terentateks eliminated, even finding himself in one's grasp on Tatooine. Berkona acknowledged Qel-Droma, Nuur, and Saresh's status as the best hunters the Jedi Order had to offer but was still shocked to hear that the Jedi Council would send the three alone to cleanse Korriban of terentateks. Berkona had light skin with [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and blue [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. ==Powers and abilities== Trained in the use of the Force, Berkona was considered one of the less skilled members of his hunting group—behind Qel-Droma, Nuur, and Saresh—and on Tatooine he was seriously wounded by a terentatek. ==Equipment== Berkona wielded a blue-colored lightsaber, which was destroyed on Tatooine. He wore a tan-colored [[Clothing/Legends|shirt]], brown pants, and dark-colored boots. For some time, he also donned a cast for his arm. ==Behind the scenes== [[File:CaleFlashpoint.jpg|thumb|right|220px|"Cale Berkona" on Flashpoint Station]] Cale Berkona first appeared in "[[Shadows and Light]]," a story in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] [[Star Wars Tales 23|''Star Wars Tales'' 23]], written by [[Joshua Ortega]], illustrated by [[Dustin Weaver]], and released on [[May 11]], [[2005]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54696/star_wars_tales_1999_23|text=Star Wars Tales (1999) #23}} As ''Shadows and Light'' did not mention Berkona's name in the story, the character was first named by Ortega in a post on the [[Dark Horse Comics]] message boards.{{DHBoards|url=viewtopic.php?p=105403|thread=Tales KOTOR story Jedi?|user=[[Joshua Ortega]]|date=2005-06-11|time=17:53|quote=Completely new Jedi in the story are Master Aleco Stusea (head of the Council on Dantooine), Bala Nisi (human female), Qual (a Selkath), and Cale Berkona (the Jedi in the terentatek's grip at the start).}} Weaver later provided the artwork for the comic [[Knights of the Old Republic 8|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 8]],[[Knights of the Old Republic 8|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 8]] which was released on [[September 20]], [[2006]].{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/12-894/Star-Wars-Knights-of-the-Old-Republic-8|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic #8}} In a post on the Dark Horse message boards, he revealed that he meant for one of the Jedi on [[Flashpoint Stellar Research Station|Flashpoint Station]] in the story to be Berkona. However, Weaver clarified the Jedi's identity as Berkona to only be "unofficial."{{DHBoards|url=viewtopic.php?p=105403|thread=KNIGHTS of the OLD REPUBLIC #8 - The doctor will see you now|user=[[Dustin Weaver]]|date=2006-10-14|time=02:40|quote=And, 'is that Cale Berkona laying on his back in Demagol's waiting room,' you ask. Officially, I don't know. He would be, what, at least in his 40s, or am I totally mixed up on my time line? You don't get a good look at his face, so I guess it's possible. Unofficially… it is him. I like doing little 'Easter egg' kind of things here and there and that definitely is one. Good eye!}} As his presence on Flashpoint Station was never alluded to in another source, this article does not include it. ==Appearances== *{{Tales|23|Shadows and Light}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Cale Berkona}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Cale Berkona |es=Cale Berkona |fi=Cale Berkona |pl=Cale Berkona |pt=Cale Berkona }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Berkona, Cale}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Jedi Knights of the Jedi Order]] [[Category:Males]]
